calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change and Change of Gender and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner THOMAS PLEVIK was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of NAME and GENDER were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Name Change to JAMIE GAARD.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female.
Order Changing Gender and issuance of new birth certificate was submitted to and signed by the Court.
